title: Expense Reimbursement Process and Deadlines
text:
Q: What is the process for expense reimbursement and what are the submission deadlines?
A: To get reimbursed for business-related expenses, employees must submit an expense report through the company's expense management system. Ensure that all receipts are attached and that each expense is clearly categorized. Reports should be submitted within 30 days of incurring the expense to ensure timely processing. The finance team reviews submissions within two weeks and processes payments in the next payroll cycle. Late submissions may result in delayed reimbursement, so timely submission is crucial. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the finance department.
